about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · Data Analyst
about.description: I started in data analytics, spending months turning messy spreadsheets into business decisions for companies in logistics, F&B, and heavy machinery. Now I work full-stack with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Supabase. My current project is Servgo, a SaaS platform combining POS, digital storefront, and analytics for cafés and restaurants.

leadIn.label: WHAT I DO
leadIn.thesis: I build web apps that solve real problems. Currently shipping Servgo, a SaaS POS & storefront platform for cafés and restaurants.
leadIn.scope: Building production web applications with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Supabase. Background in data analytics with SQL, Python, Tableau, and Excel.
leadIn.bridging: From data analytics to full-stack development.
leadIn.integration: End-to-end product development: database design, authentication, payments, real-time dashboards, multi-tenant architecture.

coreEngineering.p1: I build production web applications with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Supabase, focusing on scalable architecture and clean code.

profile.title:
Building Web Apps
That Solve Real Problems.
profile.narrative: I started in data analytics, spending months turning messy spreadsheets into business decisions for companies in logistics, F&B, and heavy machinery. Somewhere along the way I got hooked on programming and decided to stop analyzing other people's products and build my own.
profile.narrative2: Now I work full-stack with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Supabase. My current project is Servgo, a SaaS platform combining POS, digital storefront, and analytics for cafés and restaurants. It's live, serving a coffee chain with two locations.

experiencesList.desc: Technical evaluation and quality assurance of ML project submissions. Validating logical correctness, efficiency, and enforcing industry best practices for learners.
Translating complex requirements into SRS documentation and designing system architectures using UML diagrams. focused on software design.
Developing AI-driven research products and designing learning materials for Deep Learning and Computer Vision. Contributing to intelligent systems.
Built Transformer-based attack detection models for cybersecurity applications. Managed large-scale datasets through the full ML pipeline.
End-to-end development of intelligent models using state-of-the-art Deep Learning architectures. Implemented ML algorithms for real-world applications.

projectsList.title: Creative Portfolio Website
projectsList.desc: Modern, animated portfolio with 3D elements, physics-simulated interactions, and shader-based warp effects. Engineered for high performance & optimization.

projectsList.title: SNBTIn - Platform Persiapan SNBT 2025
projectsList.desc: Leading EdTech platform in Indonesia for exam preparation. Featuring a comprehensive learning ecosystem with interactive and real-time analytics.

projectsList.title: TerraFlow Platform
projectsList.desc: Enterprise IoT solution for precision agriculture. ESP32 sensor nodes communicate with Firebase via a Go (Gin), with a Next.js dashboard for real-time monitoring

projectsList.title: DocsInsight Engine
projectsList.desc: Private RAG platform for intelligent document analysis. Powered by local LLMs through Ollama, with LangChain orchestration and ChromaDB vector search.

projectsList.title: POLABDC Dental Management
projectsList.desc: AI-powered dental clinic SaaS with disease prediction, real-time queue management, and a Monorepo architecture Next.js, Express.js, and Python

hero.title: LET'S TALK
hero.subtitle: Have an idea? Let's build something extraordinary together.

faqData.q: What is your main area of expertise?
faqData.a: I'm a Full-Stack Developer and Data Analyst. I build web apps with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Supabase, and conduct data analysis projects with SQL, Python, Tableau, and Excel.

faqData.q: Are you available for freelance projects?
faqData.a: Yes! I'm open to web app development, SaaS projects, data analysis, and automation work. Feel free to reach out via email or WhatsApp.

faqData.q: What is your typical tech stack?
faqData.a: For web apps: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, Vercel. For data analysis: Python (Pandas, NumPy), SQL, Tableau, Excel.
Yes, I built Servgo, a SaaS platform for cafés and restaurants that's live serving 2 outlets with POS, digital storefront, and analytics dashboard.

faqData.q: How can we start a project?
faqData.a: The most efficient way is to use the contact form above or reach out directly via email at anggitdjokow00@gmail.com. I usually respond within 24 hours.
